violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -Raw chicken stored above cooked chicken in walk in cooler.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Shelves are rusty in walk in cooler.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean top of dishwasher.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Single use cups on floor.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors in walk in cooler need cleaned.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. -Chicken in bottom warmer 126-140F. Using non heat lamp bulbs.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
